mapper.select: select t.id, t.task_code, t.name, t.status, t.priority, t.progress, t.assignee_id, u.real_name as assignee_name, t.planned_start_date, t.planned_end_date, t.deadline_date, t.constraint_type, t.constraint_date, t.actual_start_date, t.actual_end_date, t.planned_hours, t.actual_hours, t.description, t.parent_task_id, t.wbs_id, w.node_name as wbs_name, t.milestone_id, m.name as milestone_name, (select count(1) from project_task c where c.parent_task_id = t.id and c.is_deleted = 0) as child_task_count from project_task t left join sys_user u on u.id = t.assignee_id left join wbs_node w on w.id = t.wbs_id left join milestone m on m.id = t.milestone_id where t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.id = #{taskId} and t.is_deleted = 0

select td.id, td.predecessor_task_id, pre.name as predecessor_task_name, td.successor_task_id, suc.name as successor_task_name, td.dependency_type, td.lag_days from task_dependency td left join project_task pre on pre.id = td.predecessor_task_id left join project_task suc on suc.id = td.successor_task_id where td.project_id = #{projectId} and (td.predecessor_task_id = #{taskId} or td.successor_task_id = #{taskId}) order by td.id desc

select td.id, td.predecessor_task_id, pre.name as predecessor_task_name, td.successor_task_id, suc.name as successor_task_name, td.dependency_type, td.lag_days from task_dependency td left join project_task pre on pre.id = td.predecessor_task_id left join project_task suc on suc.id = td.successor_task_id where td.project_id = #{projectId} order by td.id desc

select id, project_id, parent_task_id, wbs_id, milestone_id, task_code, name, description, task_type, priority, status, progress, assignee_id, planned_start_date, planned_end_date, deadline_date, constraint_type, constraint_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, planned_hours, actual_hours, planned_cost, actual_cost, sort_order, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from project_task where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{taskId} and is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, parent_task_id, wbs_id, milestone_id, task_code, name, description, task_type, priority, status, progress, assignee_id, planned_start_date, planned_end_date, deadline_date, constraint_type, constraint_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, planned_hours, actual_hours, planned_cost, actual_cost, sort_order, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from project_task where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0

select c.id, c.project_id, c.task_id, c.user_id, u.real_name as user_name, c.content, c.reply_to_id, ru.real_name as reply_to_name, c.created_at from task_comment c left join sys_user u on u.id = c.user_id left join task_comment rc on rc.id = c.reply_to_id left join sys_user ru on ru.id = rc.user_id where c.project_id = #{projectId} and c.task_id = #{taskId} and c.is_deleted = 0 order by c.created_at desc, c.id desc

select c.id, c.project_id, c.task_id, c.user_id, u.real_name as user_name, c.content, c.reply_to_id, ru.real_name as reply_to_name, c.created_at from task_comment c left join sys_user u on u.id = c.user_id left join task_comment rc on rc.id = c.reply_to_id left join sys_user ru on ru.id = rc.user_id where c.project_id = #{projectId} and c.id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into project_task ( id, project_id, parent_task_id, wbs_id, milestone_id, task_code, name, description, task_type, priority, status, progress, assignee_id, planned_start_date, planned_end_date, deadline_date, constraint_type, constraint_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, planned_hours, actual_hours, planned_cost, actual_cost, sort_order, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{parentTaskId}, #{wbsId}, #{milestoneId}, #{taskCode}, #{name}, #{description}, #{taskType}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{assigneeId}, #{plannedStartDate}, #{plannedEndDate}, #{deadlineDate}, #{constraintType}, #{constraintDate}, #{actualStartDate}, #{actualEndDate}, #{plannedHours}, #{actualHours}, #{plannedCost}, #{actualCost}, #{sortOrder}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: update project_task set parent_task_id = #{parentTaskId}, wbs_id = #{wbsId}, milestone_id = #{milestoneId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, task_type = #{taskType}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, planned_start_date = #{plannedStartDate}, planned_end_date = #{plannedEndDate}, deadline_date = #{deadlineDate}, constraint_type = #{constraintType}, constraint_date = #{constraintDate}, remark = #{remark}, planned_hours = #{plannedHours}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where project_id = #{projectId} and id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select t.id, t.parent_task_id as parent_id, t.name, coalesce(t.planned_start_date, t.actual_start_date) as start_time, coalesce(t.planned_end_date, t.actual_end_date) as end_time, t.progress, t.task_type from project_task t where t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.is_deleted = 0 order by coalesce(t.planned_start_date, t.actual_start_date), t.id

select t.id, t.task_code, t.name, t.status, t.priority, t.progress, t.assignee_id, u.real_name as assignee_name, t.planned_start_date, t.planned_end_date, t.actual_start_date, t.actual_end_date, t.planned_hours, t.actual_hours from project_task t left join sys_user u on u.id = t.assignee_id where t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.is_deleted = 0 and t.planned_start_date is not null and (t.deadline_date is not null or t.planned_end_date is not null) order by t.planned_start_date asc, t.planned_end_date desc, t.priority desc limit 10

select t.id as task_id, t.name as task_name, case when t.deadline_date is not null and t.deadline_date < #{now} and t.status <> 'DONE' then 'HIGH' when t.deadline_date is not null and t.deadline_date <= date_add(#{now}, interval 3 day) and t.status <> 'DONE' then 'MEDIUM' when t.planned_end_date is not null and t.planned_end_date < #{now} and t.status <> 'DONE' then 'HIGH' when t.planned_end_date is not null and t.planned_end_date <= date_add(#{now}, interval 3 day) and t.status <> 'DONE' then 'MEDIUM' else 'LOW' end as alert_level, case when t.deadline_date is not null and t.deadline_date < #{now} and t.status <> 'DONE' then '任务已超过截止日期' when t.deadline_date is not null and t.deadline_date <= date_add(#{now}, interval 3 day) and t.status <> 'DONE' then '任务将在3天内达到截止日期' when t.planned_end_date is not null and t.planned_end_date < #{now} and t.status <> 'DONE' then '任务已逾期且未完成' when t.planned_end_date is not null and t.planned_end_date <= date_add(#{now}, interval 3 day) and t.status <> 'DONE' then '任务将在3天内到期' else '任务进度正常' end as alert_message from project_task t where t.project_id = #{projectId} and t.is_deleted = 0 and t.planned_end_date is not null and t.status <> 'DONE' order by coalesce(t.deadline_date, t.planned_end_date) asc

select td.id, td.predecessor_task_id, pre.name as predecessor_task_name, td.successor_task_id, suc.name as successor_task_name, td.dependency_type, td.lag_days from task_dependency td left join project_task pre on pre.id = td.predecessor_task_id left join project_task suc on suc.id = td.successor_task_id where td.project_id = #{projectId} and td.id = #{id}
